components.value: V, S, M (pinch of cat fur)

description.value: The transmuted creature becomes more graceful, agile, and coordinated. The spell grants a +4 enhancement bonus to Dexterity, adding the usual benefits to AC, Reflex saves, and other uses of the Dexterity modifier. Cat’s Grace, Mass This spell functions like cat’s grace, except that it affects multiple creatures. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
